# Homebrew formulas to package
# Add one formula name per line
# Source: https://workbrew.com/blog/favorite-homebrew-packages-2026

# System monitoring
btop
fastfetch

# Search & navigation
fzf
the_silver_searcher

# Shell enhancements
atuin

# Utilities
displayplacer
jq
tree

# Kubernetes and cloud CLIs (Issue #138)
k9s
kubernetes-cli
azure-cli

# Development runtimes (Issue #47)
node

# Embedded tooling (Issues #205, #219)
uuu
